title: Frequency
description: A headway-based service specification indicating how often a vehicle runs on a route within a given time window.

headwaySecs.description: Time in seconds between consecutive vehicle departures

exactTimes.description: Whether departures are at exact scheduled times (true) or headway-based (false)

startTime.description: Time at which this frequency period begins (HH:MM:SS)

endTime.description: Time at which this frequency period ends (HH:MM:SS)
